name: They Are Everywhere
objectives: Search around the camp west of Tiger Bay and find out what happened to the rival PMC operative
Search along the river for the other PMC operatives
reward_text: Rewards Reputation with Reputation with after the first completion. It's official. I've confirmed that the dead contractors were working for our competition. It seems they got too close to the jungle, and someone definitely didn’t appreciate it. We need to exercise extreme caution around those woods; you never know who might be watching and waiting for the chance to take us out.

name: A Small Favor
objectives: Shred the folder and report back to Turncoat.
Locate the folder in Fort Narith HQ
reward_text: Rewards Reputation with Turncoat $1,200 AK-74M

name: Artisan's List

reward_text: Rewards after first completion Reputation with Artisan Reputation with

Locate the intel
reward_text: Rewards Reputation with Handshake Vudu 1-6x24 FFP Rifle Scope 7.62x51mm AP (M61)

name: At the Mounds of Madness
objectives: Find proof of the cult's presence in Ban Pan (22:00 - 5:00)
Find an ominous mural
Find an eerie mural
Find a chilling mural
Find a disturbing statue
reward_text: Rewards Reputation with Artisan Mosin-Nagant (Sniper) 7.62x54R Sniper Round (7N1)

name: At the Mounds of Madness II
objectives: Retrieve the intel from Ban Pa and report back to Artisan (22:00 - 5:00)
reward_text: Rewards Reputation with Artisan This... this is nonsense! Complete fucking nonsense! These people were playing us all for fools. Now I'm not even sure if those tales about mutilated bodies hold any truth. Likely a part of the same scam to scare folks away. I just can't wrap my head around why those bastards from the LAF turned a blind eye to it. They had no qualms about cracking down on everyone else on this island, so why let this slide? Keep at it, merc. Maybe you'll unearth more.

name: Aye Aye, Captain
objectives: Location of dock behind UNLRA building .
Location of dock behind UNLRA building .
Once behind the UNLRA building, go through the dock, at the end of it, the boat will be there.
Once behind the UNLRA building, go through the dock, at the end of it, the boat will be there.

Interact with red boat to complete task.
reward_text: Rewards after first completion Reputation with Reputation with after first completion

name: Baked
objectives: Retrieve evidence of drug trade in Tiger Bay Central and report back to Banshee
Locate the evidence
reward_text: Rewards after first completion Reputation with Banshee Reputation with

name: Big Entrance
objectives: Find and mark all the LAF weapon caches in Tiger Bay Central (22:00 - 5:00)
reward_text: Rewards Reputation with $4,200 Muxxum Rifle Case You did well. The exact locations of their weapon caches will be golden when we launch our strike against them. And knowing they don't have as much as we expected is a nice bonus.

name: Buyer of Untold Truths
objectives: Retrieve the medical records in Tiger Bay and report back to Turncoat
reward_text: Rewards Reputation with Turncoat $2,800 Friend, this is marvelous! These documents are packed with groundbreaking and shocking information. Just skimming through them, I think I’ll have to raise the price a little! You have my heartfelt thanks. And as always, don’t worry - I’ll put them to good use...

name: Carnivore
objectives: Collect biological samples from Hunter's Paradise
reward_text: Rewards Reputation with Lab Rat $6,300 Basic Surgical & Suture Kit

name: Crumb Collector
objectives: Retrieve the medical records and report back to Lab Rat
Locate the medical records in Tiger Bay
reward_text: Rewards Reputation with Lab Rat EPO V2 ORI-12 V2

name: Deal of the Century
objectives: Retrieve the evidence and report back to Banshee
Locate the Evidence
reward_text: Rewards Reputation with Banshee Mossberg 590 M590 12GA 10-Round Magazine

name: Deep Depravity
objectives: Investigate the atrocities at YBL-1
Bring evidence of atrocities to Banshee
Locate the evidence
reward_text: Rewards 1,000 Experience Reputation with Banshee This is exactly what we needed. The VHS contains definitive evidence that we can use in our case against the Democratic Republic of Lamang. Anyone who criticized the government - whether opposition, dissenters, or just those deemed unnecessary - disappeared into The Hole. Thank you for your cooperation; your help is greatly appreciated.

name: Dishonest Practices
objectives: Place the tracker in a weapon crate in a restaurant in Tiger Bay (22:00-5:00)
reward_text: Rewards Reputation with Turncoat M2 Plate Carrier Friend, excellent job! I hope the weapons arrive at that annoying buyer soon enough. I'm looking forward to having a "friendly" chat with him. Here is your promised reward.

name: Domesticated Rat
objectives: Go to the shack south of  Hunter's Paradise to meet the contact
Go to the hut in the woods east of the shack and secure intel from the contact
Retrieve the intel and report back to Handshake
reward_text: Rewards Reputation with Handshake Reputation with Handshake

name: Double Exposure
objectives: Bring the first package to an office building near Fort Narith main entrance
Pick up the first package inside a barn at the Xiong Family Farm
Bring the second package to a motel in Nakasa village
Pick up the first package inside a barn at the Xiong Family Farm
Ensure your survival and do not lose those packages
reward_text: Rewards Reputation with Turncoat $1,880 I applaud your expertise, friend! I'm sure that once the two gentlemen learn what I know about them, they will hastily fall in line. Thank you very much for taking care of this little matter for me.

name: Downsizing
objectives: Retrieve dog tags from five of the LAF officers at Forth Narith 0/5
reward_text: Rewards Reputation with Turncoat $2,300 Friend, great job! The soldiers must be running around the base like chickens hit by a hawk. I'm happy that you're happy. Now I'll sleep a little easier... I mean because you did what was best for you. Yes, that's why! Ha Ha!

name: Dragonslayer
objectives: Location of the commander on the map.
Location of the commander on the map.
The building where the commander is located.
The building where the commander is located.
What the commander looks like.
What the commander looks like.
reward_text: Rewards Reputation with Turncoat Mosin-Nagant (Sniper) Friend, you are an unstoppable force of nature. Such a beautiful display of pure violence. I'm sure even Mr. Handshake will be happy to see your company spread its wings a little further. You have my gratitude for getting rid of the alien worm.

name: Evacuation Question
objectives: Retrieve the intel and report back to Artisan
Locate the official orders regarding the UNLRA evacuation
reward_text: Rewards Reputation with Artisan Mosin-Nagant (Sniper) According to this document... the army was ordered to actively prevent civilians from evacuating?! What a bunch of monsters! Using innocent people as shields. But why? And... where is everyone? I need to think. This doesn’t make any fucking sense...

name: Expansion
objectives: Retrieve the LLA plans east of YBL-1 and report back to Gunny
Locate the LLA Plans
reward_text: Rewards Reputation with This looks promising. Good work. It seems like the rebels are indeed gearing up for the huge op on the island's east side. We'll decode what we can from the intel. In the meantime, take a well-deserved rest and enjoy your reward. You've earned it.

name: Family Heirloom
objectives: Retrieve the valuables from Nakasa village and report back to Turncoat
Locate the valuables
reward_text: Rewards Reputation with Turncoat 6B23-1(Flora) Friend, you did it! You are a true treasure. I'm sure you've figured out that I wouldn't send you for some shitty baubles. You just made the current commander of Fort Narith a lot poorer. Ha ha ha! He stashed his money in this briefcase, and you... Ha ha ha, the look on your face! I'm sorry I had to deceive you. You know how it is with money and friends - you just don't ask a friend for cash.

name: Final Liberation
objectives: Eliminate the rebel leader in YBL-1.
reward_text: Rewards Reputation with Turncoat $3,000 Ha ha ha! Friend, you are a wise and merciless man. I love it! The death of old Lani will strike fear into the hearts of the LLA assholes. Long have I waited for this moment. Sweet, sweet revenge. You have my gratitude.

name: Firestarter
objectives: Find out what happened in Khamphet village
Investigate who is responsible for the atrocities
reward_text: Rewards Reputation with Lab Rat Strychnine I feel like everyone I’ve ever tried to help here ends up dead sooner or later. Is it me? Could it all be my fault? I was just trying to do some good...

name: First Hit
objectives: Location of the marketplace on the map. Despite being the starting city of lamang, the market place is always approximatively in the middle of the town.
Location of the marketplace on the map. Despite being the starting city of lamang, the market place is always approximatively in the middle of the town.
A picture of the criminal leader.
A picture of the criminal leader.
Picture of the equipment of the criminal leader.
Picture of the equipment of the criminal leader.
reward_text: Rewards Reputation with Handshake $2,300 EXFIL(Multicam)

name: Fort Narith Stroll
objectives: Ascertain the state of all official entrances into Fort Narith
Check the barracks entrance
Check the main entrance
Check the fuel supply entrance
Check the airfield back entrance
reward_text: Rewards Reputation with Handshake $4,600 Recon Chest Rig

name: Fresh Meat II
objectives: Picture of the room where is located the objective.
Picture of the room where is located the objective.
Location of the abandonned shack on the map.
Location of the abandonned shack on the map.
Overview of the shack.
Overview of the shack.
Inspect and report the matress.
Inspect and report the matress.
reward_text: Rewards Reputation with Banshee MP5 Standard 30-Round Magazine It doesn't matter how often I find places like this, it always makes me sick to my stomach. It never gets easier, that’s for sure. I think we’re starting to get the complete picture now, but there’s still one piece missing. I’ll talk to you soon.

name: Fresh Meat III
objectives: Location of the body on the map.
Location of the body on the map.
The crashed vehicle.
The crashed vehicle.
Search the body and pick-up the intel.
Search the body and pick-up the intel.
reward_text: Rewards Reputation with Banshee 7.62x51mm FMJ (M80A1) Just as I thought, it looks like the vast majority of the tourists were transported to the Midnight Sapphire Resort. As for the rest, we cannot be sure yet, but I’m confident we’ll get to the bottom of it eventually. Thank you for your help. While there’s only a slim chance that we may be able to help these people, we can at least bring those responsible to justice and ensure that this doesn’t happen again.

name: Friendly Suggestion
objectives: Location of the commander on the map.
Location of the commander on the map.
reward_text: Rewards Reputation with Turncoat Friend, my gratitude knows no bounds. That scoundrel had it coming for far too long - his obstructionism was intolerable. I'm glad that your actions not only benefit me and your company but also contribute to the betterment of this land!

name: Garbage Disposal
objectives: Go to Savanpha village and find out what happened to Jai Tan
Go to the dumping ground near Savanpha village and locate Jai Tan
reward_text: Rewards Reputation with Artisan 7.62x54R AP (7N13) I had my suspicions that Jai was working with the LLA, but now they say he was Narith's lapdog - a spy! I knew him from childhood... No! This must be a mistake. I refuse to believe he was just full of shit after all this time. But the LLA... I have to do something. This isn't right!

name: Girls Just Wanna Have Fun
objectives: Search the Midnight Sapphire and uncover what happened to Ying Vilaysack
reward_text: Rewards Reputation with Artisan $3,800 AK 7.62 Mag

reward_text: Rewards Reputation with SOCOM 3 Prong Flash Hider SOCOM556 RC1 Suppressor I was starting to think those supplies were gone for good. Good work, this'll help us a lot.

reward_text: Rewards Reputation with Handshake $2,800 Well, this is just getting better and better, doesn’t it? Not only are they supposedly some assholes from afar, but from what you’re telling me, they’re making fucking explosives! Only God knows what they’re planning to do with them… This has to be dealt with pronto, understand?

name: Incognito
objectives: Retrieve intel from the house of the mysterious individual west of Tiger Bay Central
Locate the intel
reward_text: Rewards Reputation with $3,300 Recon Plate Carrier I knew my hunch was correct! According to this intel, this guy was a trained contractor who disappeared into the jungle just before the Event. He’s probably working for the bastards who attacked us, and now we know they’ve been preparing for something like this for a long-ass time! Damn it, the more we learn, the more I feel like we’re being kept in the dark.

reward_text: Rewards Reputation with Banshee 870 USD I see. So, our suspicions were spot on. The merch was intended for both foreign and domestic markets. That logbook you brought paints a much clearer picture, but we don’t have all the information yet. I’ll work on it and let you know once I discover more. Great work, by the way.

reward_text: Rewards Reputation with $2,400 Damn, looking at the last entry in her diary does not look good. She met some “cool people” who like to party, and they were about to show her their “special place.” Goddammit! Why are kids so stupid!? I have a really bad feeling about this. Let’s just hope I’m wrong.

name: Lost Hope

name: Missing Colleague
objectives: Find out what happened to Artisan's colleague.
Locate any intel about the colleague's whereabouts.
reward_text: Rewards Reputation with Artisan So he was arrested? Ah, fuck! You stupid old idealist, what the hell have you done this time? Merc, I need some time to think. Why don’t you go away and kill some babies or whatever it is you do for fun, hm?

name: Missing Colleague II
objectives: Retrieve the interrogation transcript and report back to Artisan
Locate the interrogation transcript
reward_text: Rewards Reputation with Artisan $1,880 So he sabotaged the vehicles at Fort Narith? God, you old fool! He was always opposing the government, but to be so reckless... it's not like him at all. I must make some calls and find him quickly...

name: Narcotic Bargain

reward_text: Rewards Reputation with Turncoat Light Anatomical Belt Type 2 (Olive) Friend, you are a miracle! It is truly educational to learn how drug distribution works. I feel like a drug archaeologist discovering long-lost treasures. Don't worry, I won't forget your friendliness.

name: Native Negotiations

at the command tent in the Base Camp
reward_text: Rewards Reputation with Lab Rat Excellent work. The drop went smoothly, and that’s all I needed from you. Now we wait and see if our new friend keeps his word. It might take a while, but either way, we’ll be ready.

reward_text: Rewards Reputation with $1,250 On one hand, it's a relief that they can’t use their vehicles against us. On the other hand, it means we’ll have to find fuel elsewhere. If it weren’t for that damned blockade...

name: Out Of the Blue
objectives: Investigate what happened to the  recon team sent to Blue Lagoon
Locate a suitable LZ near the Blue Lagoon
reward_text: Rewards Reputation with $2,800 Alright, you know what? Fuck it. We've got way too much shit on our plate right now to be chasing revenge for every damn act of violence on this rock. I'm not risking more of our people just to take over some goddamn tourist spot. There’s nothing of real value there anyway. For now, we’ll avoid it and focus our efforts elsewhere. But once we’ve got our situation under control, those bastards will pay...

name: Prisoner 23
objectives: Retrieve information about prisoner 23 in  the west section of YBL-1 and report back to Artisan
Locate the intel
reward_text: Rewards Reputation with Artisan Fuck! Those motherfuckers tortured him! Sick bastards! I'm gonna kill every last one of them! Thank God he wasn't executed, but they've transported him somewhere else, and I have no idea where! All this time, and I'm back to square one! Po, I'm so sorry... Why the FUCK are you still here!? Just get lost, okay!? I need to be alone!

name: Propaganda Problems

reward_text: Rewards Reputation with Reputation with after the first completion Well, that’s a bummer. I’ll need to have a talk with the scouts. They should have their damn eyes checked if they’re mistaking a bunch of boxes for a weapon cache. This’ll be on their plate for a long time. Sloppy work won’t be tolerated.

But you did the right thing by delivering the flash drive... and not killing them all. Those rebels deserved at least that.

name: Skycrawlers II
objectives: Location of the office on the map.
Location of the office on the map.
Overview of the terminal.
Overview of the terminal.
The way to the room in the terminal.
The way to the room in the terminal.
Logbook on top of a box next to a desk.
Logbook on top of a box next to a desk.
reward_text: Rewards Reputation with Banshee $5,500 Okay, judging by this logbook, the narcotics were transported here from a yet unknown location, probably the production plant, and then processed, packed, and shipped off by planes with oblivious tourists inside. Laos, Cambodia, Vietnam, Thailand… they were quite busy, I see. With tourists on board the planes, the volume of the shipments wasn’t great, but they clearly made up for it with the frequent flights. You did well. Now we need to find the source.

name: Snooper
objectives: Locate all the enemy supplies at the gas station east of Fort Narith
Secure the supplies next to a pickup truck
Secure the supplies in the bathroom
Secure the supplies next to a large truck
reward_text: Rewards Reputation with That stupid girl… I knew she was trouble from the moment I first met her. Look, I won't lie to you. I'm not happy about this. Those things are meant for our soldiers, for our mission. But I'm also not blind to the bigger picture. Some of these people that got left here, they're in dire need too. We can't just turn our backs on them. I'll sweep this incident under the rug, but this is the last time, got it? And you better keep your mouth shut about it. The last thing we need is the higher-ups breathing down our necks. We're in enough shit as is.

name: The Mistress
objectives: Search the convenience store in Tiger Bay and find clues about Lae Sayasane
Search the UNLRA dorms in Tiger Bay and find more clues about Lae Sayasane
Locate the pond southwest of Tiger Bay Central and find out what happened to Lae Sayasane
reward_text: Rewards Reputation with Artisan $1,880 We didn't find Lae, but at least we know she's probably alive. A girl with her skills is definitely a survivor. I'll inform her friend of our findings... Why are you looking at me like that? Should I shed tears for that pig? No way. I wouldn’t be surprised if he abused her or something and got what he deserved. Your job is done, mercenary; you can return to your own killings.

name: The More the Merrier
objectives: Retrieve intel from the barracks and report back to Handshake
Locate patrol documents
reward_text: Rewards Reputation with Handshake $1,800 Well done! With information like this, we are one step closer to seizing Fort Narith. And it gets better - this document reveals why the LAF is still hanging around. They were ordered by El Presidente himself to protect high-value targets after the UNLRA cleared everyone out. It’s not just Fort Narith; they’re guarding Midnight Sapphire and Tiger Bay too. Seems like the main man was worried someone might do some snooping around after all the dust settled. Well, he was right about that...

name: The Rebel Path
area: YBL-1, Tiger Bay, Ban Pa, Midnight Sapphire
objectives: Locate all hidden LLA outposts
Locate the LLA outpost northeast of Ban Pa
Locate the LLA outpost northwest of Tiger Bay
Locate the LLA outpost northwest of YBL-1
Locate the LLA outpost west of Midnight Sapphire
reward_text: Rewards Reputation with Razor 1-6x Rifle Scope Nicely done. Let’s hope that’s really all of their camps. Stay sharp and watch your back. You never know when one of those bastards might pop out of the ground like a pissed-off gopher.

name: The Runaway
objectives: Find out what happened to the tourists that managed to escape from the Blue Lagoon
reward_text: Rewards Reputation with Lab Rat Thank you for looking into this, even though it ended up as always. I honestly don't think I can keep doing this. Always getting my hopes up and then... I better focus on my research, yes. That's why I agreed to all of this in the first place. No more drama, no more needless death. I just need to take a step back...

reward_text: Rewards Reputation with Turncoat What a tragedy, friend. If you had brought him back alive, I would have rewarded you handsomely.. Regrettably, you've only brought information about his sorrowful demise. But don't grieve, friend. I know you did your best. Here is a small reward for your efforts; hopefully, it will motivate you to accomplish your next task. I will tell you more soon.

reward_text: Rewards Reputation with $4,200 Well... he wasn’t much of a talker, that’s for sure. The only intel the LAF managed to squeeze out of him is that he’s a contractor from Russia, and his company was operating on this damn island even before we got here. We need to keep digging for more on these pricks. There’s still too much we don’t know, and it could cost us big time. You did well. Get some rest.
